---
# Copy this file to your-section/index.qmd to start a new editorial page.
# It already uses the shared .pg-* system, so it matches Teaching and Software.
# The leading underscore makes Quarto skip this template when rendering.
pagetitle: "Section name - Thinh Ong"
description: "One short sentence describing the page."
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="pg">

  <!-- Hero. The title is pinned to the top by the shared system, so it lines
       up with every other page. The stats block is optional: delete it if the
       page has no counters. -->
  <div class="pg-hero">
    <div class="pg-hero__head">
      <span class="pg-eyebrow">Eyebrow label</span>
      <h1 class="pg-title">Page <span class="pg-title-thin">&amp; Title</span></h1>
    </div>
    <div class="pg-hero__aside">
      <p class="pg-lead">One short sentence that describes what this page is.</p>
      <div class="pg-stats">
        <div class="pg-stat"><span class="pg-stat-num" data-to="6">6</span><span class="pg-stat-label">Things</span></div>
        <span class="pg-sep"></span>
        <div class="pg-stat"><span class="pg-stat-num" data-to="3">3</span><span class="pg-stat-label">Categories</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Body: a stack of soft panels on the left, a sticky contents nav on the
       right. Give every panel a unique id and a matching nav link. -->
  <div class="pg-body">
    <main class="pg-main">

      <section class="pg-panel" id="sec-one">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div>
            <span class="pg-num">[01]</span>
            <h2 class="pg-sectitle">Section one</h2>
            <p class="pg-secsub">Optional one-line subtitle for the section.</p>
          </div>
          <span class="pg-count">2 items</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Page-specific content goes here. Namespace any new classes (for
             example .xx-card) and style them with the design tokens. -->
      </section>

      <section class="pg-panel" id="sec-two">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div>
            <span class="pg-num">[02]</span>
            <h2 class="pg-sectitle">Section two</h2>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- ...content... -->
      </section>

    </main>

    <nav class="pg-toc" aria-label="Sections on this page">
      <p class="pg-toc-h">On this page</p>
      <a href="#sec-one" class="active"><span class="tn">01</span><span class="tt">Section one</span></a>
      <a href="#sec-two"><span class="tn">02</span><span class="tt">Section two</span></a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
// Standard behaviour for a .pg page: count-up stats, fade panels in on scroll,
// and keep one contents-nav item highlighted. Copy as-is; it is generic.
(function () {
  var root = document.querySelector('.pg');
  if (!root) return;
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  // count-up for hero stats
  root.querySelectorAll('.pg-stat-num').forEach(function (el) {
    var to = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-to'), 10) || 0;
    if (reduce) { el.textContent = to; return; }
    var n = 0, step = Math.max(1, Math.round(to / 16));
    el.textContent = '0';
    var t = setInterval(function () { n += step; if (n >= to) { n = to; clearInterval(t); } el.textContent = n; }, 55);
  });

  // fade panels in
  if (!reduce && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    root.classList.add('anim');
    var reveal = new IntersectionObserver(function (es) {
      es.forEach(function (e) { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('in'); reveal.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12 });
    root.querySelectorAll('.pg-panel').forEach(function (p) { reveal.observe(p); });
  }

  // contents-nav scrollspy
  var links = root.querySelectorAll('.pg-toc a');
  var panels = Array.prototype.slice.call(root.querySelectorAll('.pg-panel[id]'));
  function linkFor(id) { for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].hash === '#' + id) return links[i]; } return null; }
  function setActive(link) { links.forEach(function (l) { l.classList.toggle('active', l === link); }); }
  var navLock = false, lockT, ticking = false;
  function syncActive() {
    ticking = false;
    if (navLock || !panels.length) return;
    var line = window.innerHeight * 0.28, current = panels[0];
    panels.forEach(function (p) { if (p.getBoundingClientRect().top <= line) current = p; });
    setActive(linkFor(current.id));
  }
  function onScroll() { if (!ticking) { ticking = true; requestAnimationFrame(syncActive); } }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener('resize', onScroll, { passive: true });
  syncActive();
  links.forEach(function (a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function () {
      navLock = true; setActive(a);
      clearTimeout(lockT);
      lockT = setTimeout(function () { navLock = false; syncActive(); }, reduce ? 0 : 700);
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
